department: The department where the new employee onboarding process took place. In this case, it is the marketing department.
change_introduced_by: The team or department that introduced the change improving the onboarding process. Here, it is the Knowledge Management (KM) team.
change_introduced_in: The quarter and year when the change was introduced. For this insight, it is Q4 2024.
change_description: Brief description of the change that was introduced. In this case, it is the revision of training materials.
onboarding_time_saved: The average time saved in hours on the onboarding process as a result of the change. Here, it is 2 hours.
